name: vibe-coding-roadmap

comments.overrides: firebase-admin 14 (latest) transitively pulls uuid <11.1.1 (GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq) via gaxios/teeny-request. Only uuid v4 is used there (not the vulnerable v3/v5/v6 buf path), but we pin uuid to a patched version to clear the advisory without the breaking firebase-admin downgrade npm audit fix would force.
